title: Amethyst Protector
description: Protect your budding amethyst from accidental destruction!
body:
# Amethyst Protector

Tired of you or your friends accidentally destroying budding amethyst blocks? This is the mod for you! This mod makes budding amethyst impossible to mine. It works both client-side and server-side, depending on your protection needs.

Budding amethyst can still be destroyed in other ways, such as with explosions or pistons; this mod only protects against mining.
